name: Sarah Mitchell
bio: Met in freshman year. We used to pull all-nighters studying for exams. She moved to NYC after graduation but we still try to catch up regularly.

name: James Okafor
bio: My first manager at the company. Taught me everything about product thinking. Still grab coffee once a month.

name: Priya Sharma
bio: Backpacked across Southeast Asia together in 2022. She has the best travel recommendations and an infectious laugh.

name: Carlos Mendez
bio: We met at the gym two years ago. Morning workout partner and go-to person for home improvement advice.

name: Emily Chen
bio: Grew up on the same street. Our families had dinner together every Sunday. She now runs her own bakery in Portland.

name: Marcus Thompson
bio: We bonded over our shared obsession with sci-fi novels. Monthly book club co-founder. Always has a reading recommendation ready.

name: Aisha Rahman
bio: Lived together for three years in university. She knows all my secrets. Now a doctor in Chicago — incredibly proud of her.

name: Liam O'Brien
bio: Best friends since 8th grade. Drifted apart after college but still share memes and check in during the holidays.
